scripts.generate: cd apps/api && DATABASE_URL=$(grep '^DATABASE_URL' ../../.env | cut -d= -f2-) pnpm drizzle-kit generate
scripts.migrate: cd apps/api && DATABASE_URL=$(grep '^DATABASE_URL' .env 2>/dev/null || grep '^DATABASE_URL' ../../.env | cut -d= -f2-) pnpm drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build
